Complex commutative diagram with math in labels:

\begin{tikzcd}
  \mathrm{CAlg}_k^{\text{poly}}
    \ar[d, hook]
    \ar[r, "F"]
& \mathcal{C}
\\
  \Ind(\mathrm{CAlg}_k^{\text{poly}})
    \ar[d, hook, "\text{Constant diagrams}"']
    \ar[ur, "\exists \tilde F"']
&
\\
  \mathrm{sCAlg}_k
  \ar[uur, bend right, "\exists LF"']
&
\end{tikzcd}
